  1. momto2boys
    Verified Purchase
    Reviewed in the United States on May 17, 2026
    Color: Heart & Round
    Worth the purchase
    Love these! I bought them to hold pictures in graduation centerpieces and they do the job well! They tend to roll to the side because of the heavy photos but I anchored them into the styrofoam with a dot of glue (glue gun). Held them in place for a second or too and problem solved. Mine didn’t be d with the heavier photos and I’m pleased with the quality.

Previous page
Next page
Amazon Customer
5 out of 5 stars
Easy to Use and Holds Cards Securely
This 50-piece set of metal floral card holders has a long 12-inch pick, which made them useful for labeling plants. I used them in our school plant sale to help identify different types of plants. The tops come in two shapes, circles and hearts, and hold cards using a paper clip-style design. They fit postcard-sized plant labels well and kept them securely in place. The gold finish gives them a simple, clean look, and the metal feels thin but sturdy enough to hold 6" cards. The long metal pick is somewhat flexible, which wasn't an issue placing into soil, but it does require a bit of care when placing into harder substances to avoid bending. They were easy to use overall, and I was able to place and remove cards without issues. The length helped keep them stable once inserted. Overall, these holders worked well for organizing and displaying plant labels, with a simple design that held up during use.
